auth.title: Log in
auth.modalSubtitle: Sign in to join, save content and manage your activities.
auth.pageSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access Trento Live Activity

errors.missingCredentials: Enter both your email and password.

social.googleNoToken: Google did not return an access_token

register.title: Sign up
register.subtitle: Create an account to access Trento Live Activity
register.asEntity: Sign up as a Certified Entity
register.entitySuccess: Registration request sent! The Municipality must approve your request.

errors.missingRequired: Enter the required fields (Email and Password).
errors.passwordLength: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.consentsRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy and the Terms of Service.
errors.missingEntityFields: Enter the entity name and PEC.
errors.missingCitizenFields: Enter first name, last name and tax code.

passwordReset.subtitleRequest: You will receive a link via email to reset your password
passwordReset.success: Password reset successfully! You can now sign in.

errors.length: The password must contain at least 8 characters.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: Confirm your email address to activate your account
verifyEmail.expiredHint: The link may have expired. Check your inbox or sign up again.
verifyEmail.successBody: Thank you! Your email address has been verified and your account is now fully active.
verifyEmail.pendingBody: We sent a verification link to your email. Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.

onboarding.title: Your interests
